title: MAGAZINE ISSUE detail page » LAP TIMES
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the MAGAZINE ISSUE detail page to show all connected LAP TIMES
So I can ...
description:
* The MAGAZINE ISSUE detail page contains a section with a list of all connected LAP TIMES.
* Each LAP TIME in the list is presented with its name and primary information.
* Each LAP TIME in the list contains a link to its detail page.
* Each LAP TIME in the list has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no LAP TIME connected to the MAGAZINE ISSUE then the section is not displayed at all.
